---
title: "The Rev. William Jeffreys Hills"
---

## The Rev. William Jeffreys Hills

**Dates:** (1828/9-1898)

### Description

Vicar of Cookham, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1888)

### Biography

He contributed papers on Rome to <i>MP</i> in 1888.  He also published sermons and <i>A Manual of Church Reform</i> (1887), read to the English Church Union, which indicates a Tractarian affiliation.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 11th [1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
